name: Midnight Oatmeal Stout
description: Rich dark stout with oatmeal softness, cocoa flavor, and low sweetness.

name: Golden Hop Pilsner
description: Bright pilsner with floral hops, gentle bitterness, and a refreshing dry aftertaste.

name: Cherry Dark Ale
description: Dark ale with sour cherry notes, roasted background, and a smooth finish.

name: Summer Pale Ale
description: Easy-drinking pale ale with tropical notes, balanced hops, and a golden color.

name: Imperial Cocoa Stout
description: Strong imperial stout with cocoa, espresso, and dense roasted malt character.

name: Amber Dawn Lager
description: Light craft lager with soft malt sweetness and a clean crisp finish.

name: Dry Saison Gold
description: Golden saison with peppery notes, dry body, and lively carbonation.

name: Dark Velvet Porter
description: Dark porter with roasted malt, chocolate notes, and a smooth velvet body.

name: Honey Blonde Ale
description: Smooth blonde ale with light honey aroma, mild sweetness, and a clean finish.

name: Smoked Baltic Porter
description: Strong dark porter with smoked malt, caramel depth, and warming alcohol.

name: Citrus Wheat Ale
description: Light wheat beer with citrus aroma, soft body, and smooth cloudy texture.

name: Black River Stout
description: Full-bodied stout with coffee aroma, roasted bitterness, and a creamy finish.

name: Nordic Light IPA
description: Light IPA with pine, grapefruit, and a firm but pleasant hop bitterness.

name: Dark Forest Bock
description: Dark bock with toasted bread, caramel, and a clean malty finish.

name: Hazy Farmhouse Ale
description: Unfiltered light ale with herbal aroma, soft haze, and a rustic dry finish.
